title: Blizzardous
description: A frosty mod with snowy content!
body:
![Blizzardous](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blizzardous/BH_Blizzardous_header.webp)
Things just got much colder around the Overworld with some new frosty biomes. These biomes have many new creatures and monsters, such as:

- Floffs, small and cute creatures which can be brought home in Frostfir Crates.
- Flinxes, small but annoying creatures who enjoy rolling into people to hurt them. Extremely kickable. Bring them home in the Frostfir Crates if you want.
- Fliks, tiny bugs that fly using the 4 petal-like wings on their head. Their abdomen glows and blue color, making them similar to fireflies. Capture them in bottles and make Flik Lanterns!
- The Draugr, a new variant of zombies found in cold and snowy biomes. Inflicts slowness upon hitting you.
- Winter Ticks, bloodhungry bugs that usually enjoy coming out at night. They are specifically found within Frostfir Tiagas.
- The Nyctosis, undead forms of an unknown creature, which slowly approaches its prey to attack. It doesn't like the light, and gets more aggresive when in the light.
- The Forbannet Skulpturs (Cursed Sculptures), frozen statues that seem to move only when you aren't looking. How they came to life is unknown.
- Rimobites, small frosty trilobites that just wanna swim around. (Rimobite Buckets coming soon.) 

Enter the new biomes and face the many friends and foes within the icy lands.

Good luck...
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blizzardous/BH_Blizzardous_promo.webp)
[https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy](https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy)

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blizzardous/BH_Blizzardous_overview.webp)

This mod requires Geckolib
